scripts.prepare:native-runtime: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix; export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 20.18.2 >/dev/null; node ./scripts/native-launcher.mjs prepare-runtime'
scripts.install:native-deps: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix; export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 20.18.2 >/dev/null; node ./scripts/native-launcher.mjs install-deps'
scripts.build:native-react: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix; export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 20.18.2 >/dev/null; node ./scripts/native-launcher.mjs build-react'
scripts.start:native: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix; export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 20.18.2 >/dev/null; node ./scripts/native-launcher.mjs start'
